description: Black-and-white graphic. The image is a high-contrast photo of Mount Rushmore showing the carved heads of George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt, and Abraham Lincoln. A faint translucent American-flag star pattern is overlaid in the upper sky, and the photo has a grainy film treatment. Across the bottom in large white serif capitals: 'HONORING THEIR LEADERSHIP. REMEMBERING THEIR LEGACY.' Centered beneath the text is a small white Department of Labor seal.
notable_text: HONORING THEIR LEADERSHIP. REMEMBERING THEIR LEGACY.
